#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a non-const copy of the source_buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> non_const_buffer = source_buffer;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor instance
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>, false> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    // Create a destination vector of size bytes_to_read
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_read);

    // Read the data
    adaptor.read(dest.data(), bytes_to_read);

    return dest;
}

void write_buffer_data(std::vector<uint8_t>& dest_buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_data) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor instance
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>, false> adaptor(dest_buffer);

    // Write the source_data
    adaptor.write(source_data.data(), source_data.size());
}

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream using the buffer_adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Check if there is enough space

        return false;
    }

    // Write the header and the items
    stream << header;
    stream << items;

}
